Place sugar, salt, and water in a large stock pot over high heat until sugar and salt dissolve, mixing while it heats
Place all other ingredients except ice in the pot and bring to a boil for ~15 mins
Place in an appropriate container (lexon, 22 quart cambro, hotel pan) and let cool to room temp
Once cooled, add the ice and stir.
Brine chicken for 24 hours.
